title: Walk-in Drive Store Manager at Shoppers Stop Consulting Pvt Ltd

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Store Manager at Shoppers Stop Consulting Pvt Ltd
jsonLd.description:
Shoppers Stop Consulting Pvt Ltd invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Store Manager at our Rajkot location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Shoppers Stop Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Shoppers Stop Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Shoppers Stop Consulting Pvt Ltd!
